title: Caregiver – Manage & View PwD Profiles - Functional Test Plan
overview: Comprehensive functional testing of the Manage & View PwD Profiles feature on the AT/AD platform. Covers the Care Network Dashboard (PwD list, summary cards, limit/slots), PwD Summary Card interactions (View Profile, visual indicators for disability type/percentage/UDID, UI differentiation between PwD cards and Add PwD tile), Full PwD Profile view (read-only personal/contact/disability/education/Aadhaar/UDID details, auto-calculated age), Activity History view (device views, saved items, engagement timestamps, empty state), and edge cases (empty dashboard, partial data placeholders, network failure with retry).

inScope: Care Network Dashboard: PwD list, summary cards (Name, Disability type, Mobile, Email, Date added)
Dashboard: PwD limit display, used vs available slots, Add PwD button enablement
PwD Summary Card: View Profile CTA, visual indicators (disability type, disability percentage, UDID)
UI differentiation between PwD cards and Add PwD tile
Full PwD Profile: read-only details (Name, Age, Gender, Contact, Disability, Education, Aadhaar masked, UDID)
Age auto-calculated from Date of Birth
Activity History: device views, saved items, engagement timestamps
Activity History: empty-state message when no activity
Edge cases: empty dashboard, partial data, network failure
outOfScope: PwD limit enforcement details (covered in SCRUM-375)

testCases.title: Verify Care Network Dashboard displays PwD list with summary cards
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is logged in with at least 2 PwDs registered
steps: 1. Log in as caregiver
2. Navigate to My PwDs / Care Network Dashboard
3. Verify the page displays a list of all PwDs added by the caregiver
4. Verify each PwD is shown as a summary card
5. Verify each card contains: Name
6. Verify each card contains: Disability type
7. Verify each card contains: Mobile number
8. Verify each card contains: Email ID
9. Verify each card contains: Date added
10. Verify PwD limit is displayed (e.g., 5 max)
11. Verify used vs available slots are shown
12. Verify Add PwD button is enabled (since slots are available)
expectedResults: Dashboard loads with list of all caregiver's PwDs
Each PwD is displayed as a summary card
Cards contain Name, Disability type, Mobile, Email, Date added
PwD limit and used/available slots are displayed
Add PwD button is enabled when slots are available
testCases.postconditions: Dashboard is displayed with accurate PwD information

testCases.title: Verify Age is auto-calculated from Date of Birth
testCases.preconditions: PwD profile is open; PwD has DOB set to '1995-06-15'
steps: 1. Open PwD profile via View Profile
2. Locate the Age field
3. Verify Age is displayed as a calculated value (not a stored field)
4. Verify the age matches the expected calculation from DOB to current date
5. Check another PwD with a different DOB
6. Verify age is correctly calculated for that PwD as well
expectedResults: Age is auto-calculated from DOB, not manually entered
Age calculation is accurate based on current date
Different PwDs show correct individual ages

testCases.title: Verify Activity History view with device views, saved items, and timestamps
testCases.preconditions: PwD profile is open; PwD has activity history (device views, saved items)
steps: 1. Open PwD profile via View Profile
2. Verify 'Full Profile' tab/view is active by default
3. Locate the 'Activity History' tab/toggle
4. Click 'Activity History'
5. Verify the view switches to Activity History
6. Verify device views are listed with details
7. Verify saved items are listed
8. Verify engagement timestamps are displayed for each activity
9. Verify activities are in chronological order (most recent first)
10. Switch back to 'Full Profile'
11. Verify profile details are displayed again
expectedResults: Full Profile is the default view
Activity History tab/toggle is available
Switching shows activity history content
Device views are listed with details
Saved items are listed
Engagement timestamps are displayed
Switching back to Full Profile works correctly

testCases.title: Verify Activity History empty state when no activity exists
testCases.preconditions: PwD profile is open; PwD has NO activity history
steps: 1. Open profile of a PwD with no activity history
2. Switch to Activity History view
3. Verify an empty-state message is displayed
4. Verify the message is clear (e.g., 'No activity yet' or similar)
5. Verify the page layout is not broken by empty state
6. Verify the switch back to Full Profile works
expectedResults: Empty-state message is displayed when no activity exists
Message is clear and informative
Page layout remains intact
Tab switching still works correctly
testCases.postconditions: Activity History empty state is verified

testCases.title: Verify empty dashboard shows 'Add Your First PwD' state
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is logged in with zero PwDs
steps: 1. Log in as caregiver with no PwDs
2. Navigate to Care Network Dashboard
3. Verify empty state is displayed
4. Verify message: 'Add Your First PwD' or similar
5. Verify Add PwD button/tile is visible and enabled
6. Verify PwD limit and slots are still displayed (0/5)
expectedResults: Empty state with 'Add Your First PwD' message is displayed
Add PwD button is visible and enabled
Limit and slot information is shown (0/5)
No broken UI elements

AC1_care_network_dashboard.description: Dashboard displays PwD list, summary cards (Name, Disability, Mobile, Email, Date), limit, slots, Add button

AC4_activity_history.description: Switch between Full Profile and Activity History, device views, saved items, timestamps, empty state

EC_empty_dashboard.description: No PwDs added → Show empty state with 'Add Your First PwD'

assumptions: Caregiver registration and sign-in are functional (SCRUM-357, SCRUM-360)
PwD registration is functional for creating test PwDs (SCRUM-372)
PwD limit is configured as 5 in QA
Activity history data exists for at least one PwD in QA
Figma design is available for visual indicator verification
PwDs with varying data completeness are available
dependencies: SCRUM-363: My PwDs dashboard must be functional
SCRUM-372: PwD registration for creating test data
SCRUM-375: PwD limit enforcement for slot display
SCRUM-381: PwD deletion for slot recovery testing

open_questions_and_clarifications.question: How is Age displayed - as years only, or years and months?
What activity types are tracked in Activity History beyond device views and saved items?

priority_order: Highest tests (TC_PROFILE_001, 003) first - dashboard, activity history
High priority tests (002, 004, 005) - age calc, activity empty state, empty dashboard

estimated_effort.critical_path: 5-7 hours for critical path testing only

test_environment_requirements: QA environment with AT/AD platform accessible
Caregiver accounts with varying PwD counts and data completeness
PwDs with activity history data for Activity History testing
PwDs with and without UDID for conditional display testing
Figma design access for visual indicator verification

metadata.coverage: Core acceptance criteria covered; visual indicators, read-only profile, Aadhaar masking, partial data, network failure, and UDID conditional display removed
